response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience as a Staff Software Engineer, working with AI-agent infrastructure, and has a strong background in distributed systems, TypeScript, and Node.js. They also demonstrate experience with AI-driven development and have worked on various projects that involve complex technical skills.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and Node.js
concerns: Limited direct experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
Most experience is with companies in India, may not be directly comparable to Western companies
Some skills like DLang, while valuable, may not be directly relevant to the role

key_factors.factor: Limited direct experience with AI products
